worth

# Aug 10 2006 at 7:58 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Jagged Band sells for 4 plat 2 gold 8 silver 6 copper when offered to Sateal Deirosap vendor in the bazaar by level 2 human monk with 143 cha... Current bazaar price unavailable....
▲ Page top
RE: crap
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 7:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591772491057
34 posts
The moonstone ring is not better, it is different,if you want Mana and Strength,then the Moonstone ring is better,but it also does not have any AC bonuses that the jagged band has,the Moonstone ring also tends to be a little moe expensive because of the mana bonus of +30.

Vargaz
Dwarf Paladin of 12 seasons

"you can't compare Goblins and orcs, except that they are both ugly"
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 15 2002 at 10:43 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I've seen level 57 rangers using these peices of crap. Come on a moonstone ring is cheaper and better. Come on people. I'm a level 52 ranger and i have a shadel bandit ring and a knotted turtle bone ring.
SWEET camp
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 7:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758578638
189 posts
I Camped Garanel the other night with a lvl 42ranger friend, WE KICKED BUTT, got about 4 or 5 Bands and the boots, I am going to camp him for the boots again soon
Tazain Blackmontain <Dream Travelers>
Ranger of Tunare, 28seasons
...Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
Fun!
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2002 at 2:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762366160
28 posts
Went to Unrest the other night while waiting to get a port off Faydwer, since stupid boats weren't working. After buffing a few newbs decided to go take some light blue hags for some fun! After clearing the entire basement, i came across the ghost room. OH! DWB? Cool. Decided. I am camping Gargamel or whatever his name is.

After killing him once with no boots (but 2 rings!) A couple guildies got bored and ported to BB to come join the party. Well, to make a long story short, we pissed off a couple people from another guild, (by getting wolf form and humping on them) and killed the ghost a total of 4 times. No boots, but all 3 of us got 2 jaggeds a piece, all going to our alts...lol
▲ Page top
These are good
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2002 at 4:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771236046
32 posts
These are used by people into their 50s on mith marr. I'm using them at 31. And, for every 10 strength you have, you get an additional 7 to your attack.
▲ Page top
RE: These are good
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2003 at 12:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788009928
83 posts
I like these better than those overrated 6ac 65 hp rings. On a good day in the bazaar you can get these for 15pp. On a good day you could get 'those other rings' for 400pp. I'll take these easily for the price. Only time I replace them is if I have a hyprid, then I'll go for the spiked goblin ring (ac & wis etc) or the ring of the goblin lords (ac & int etc).
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 10 2001 at 10:06 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey if anyone on Bertoxx is selling a Jagged Band im looking to buy one so give me a tell on Kalmir
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 03 2001 at 6:12 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am looking to buy a pair on Torvonillous server. Please e-mail me at furzepha@hotmail.com
not bad

Hey that's not too shabby, +3str ring that looks cool. Not a bad price, hoping to find some soon =)
▲ Page top
STR=ATC
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 5:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750339570
11 posts
any time your str goes up it's added to your attack.... so you gain 3 str you also gain 3 attack at the same time......

and the AC you get from an idem dose go up the more deffince you have...

and consedering thise go from 25-50pp you lowbies meele classes should defently get two... rings with ac rock.. and the str is an added bonus
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 18 2001 at 5:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) any time your str goes up it's added to your attack.... so you gain 3 str you also gain 3 attack at the same time......

# Jul 08 2001 at 6:18 PM Rating: Default

7 posts

▲ Page top
ac=defense
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757385012
5 posts
Actually, its not lvl dependant i think. You got defense skill to calculate your AC. At higher lvls, even though it says an item has 5ac, you actually get more ac when you put it on. I believe it has to do with your defense skill.. The higher defense, the higher ac you get from an item, kinda like a bonus. With o defense skill (lvl 1), you would get the usual 5 ac from this item. at lvl60 and ahving 250 defense, would give you more i take it. Not at all sure of this, being a druid, so not really sure...
▲ Page top
RE: ac=defense
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2002 at 10:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
AGI will also add to your AC at higher levels. I started noticing this around 30-40. Since I'm a rogue and don't take many hits when the tanks are taunting, I swap out AC items for STR and DEX since rogues are damage dealers.
▲ Page top
RE: ac=defense
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2001 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763134893
3 posts
Yes, that is how it works. Class is also calculated into it too, warriors will yield the most, while casters on the other hand...... well they don't get much.

30th Rogue of Morell Thule
▲ Page top
Real AC versus Item AC
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2001 at 1:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I think I read somewhere that the amount of AC you get from 1 point of item AC is dependant on level. At higher levels you supposedly get more of a bonus. I could be wrong.
▲ Page top
Fatty
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2001 at 4:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Dwarf ghost spawns in basement of Unrest manor. Not really a hard place to hold once a good group clears out the place, though the hags and terrors can be a hassle, hags nuking like mad and the terrors blasting you backwards. From what I understand drops Jagged Band (sells for around 50pp or so) as common drop, as the rare drop Dwarven Work Boots, heard they drop for around 800pp, might be an old price though. Wouldn't recommend going that far into the basement in a group with less than five people, even then reasonably balanced and with high twenties and low thirties. Hope this helps
▲ Page top
not always
QuoteReply
# May 23 2001 at 4:52 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
if you equip tons of str equiptment it doesn't always give you extra attack equal to the str
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 23 2001 at 4:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) all stuff gives more ac than it says it does
Bonus?
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 10:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361354564
7 posts
I don't know how, But I seem to be getting: +9 AC; +3 ATK; +3 STR.
No Idea?
▲ Page top
RE: Bonus?
QuoteReply
# May 17 2001 at 3:30 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You will notice when you equip any item with AC on it, you get more AC in your stats than the item itself shows. I think the conversion is 1.7AC added to stats for each AC the item has. Also each STR you add also results in an equal amount of ATK increase. So if you equip a 6 STR item your ATK will be increased by 6.
▲ Page top

Someone sold their's to a merchant in Qeynos, and I bought mine there. So a big thank you to whoever sold it. My char is in the teens so it can't take out the dudes who drop this stuff, but it CAN afford to buy them off of the folks who can take them down.
